headline: JETS vs. ITA: Airlines or Aerospace, Which Aviation ETF Is Actually Flying?
summary: The U.S. Global Jets ETF (NYSEARCA:JETS) and the iShares U.S. Aerospace & Defense ETF (NYSEARCA:ITA) both carry the word aviation in their pitch, yet they bet on entirely different cash flows. JETS owns passenger airlines, airports, and aircraft makers whose fortunes hinge on leisure demand and jet fuel. ITA owns defense primes and aerospace suppliers ... JETS vs. ITA: Airlines or Aerospace, Which Aviation ETF Is Actually Flying?
